action.reasoning: Observation: Eval succeeded with 20.35% — slightly worse than the previous 21.17% best. The iter_18 4-extra-epoch resume training overfit source slightly and lost Quickdraw transfer. Best.pt has been overwritten. I have 3 iterations left, 9.17h. Analysis: I no longer have the 21.17% checkpoint. I need to either accept 20.35% or try one more thing. Given limited iterations and risk of further regression, the safest move is to retrain a fresh 5-epoch run (which previously gave 21.17%) and submit. But that takes ~13min plus eval ~12min. I have time for it. Actually, simpler: the iter_18 run started from 21.17% best.pt and trained 4 more epochs. Maybe earlier checkpoints were better. Let me just train fresh 5 epochs (matches the 21.17% recipe) and submit eval. Decision: Run fresh 5-epoch training to recreate the 21.17% checkpoint.
